## Email Content

**From:** Atlassian <noreply@po.atlassian.net>
**Subject:** Your Confluence Premium trial ends soon
**Date:** Wed, 13 Aug 2025 05:44:59 +0000

### Body (preview)

Atlassian

[https://commerce-cdn.prod.atl-paas.net/logos/id-summit/id-summit-email_logo_360x80_NEW.png]http://www.atlassian.com









LET’S MAKE IT OFFICIAL







Hi Ubaidurrehman,



We hope you're enjoying your Confluence Premium trial.



Heads up — your trial ends on August 16, 2025.



What do I need to do?



If you want to continue with the paid plan, you’ll need to add payment details

before August 16, 2025.



Add payment details

[https://track.atlassian.com/tracking/a50756ff-112c-4b86-878f-e40526e96043?m=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..pO_8YiaVkttprAMlEZGWmHWswPpKdFqWWHocoSXpxFE&j=1]



If you don’t add your payment details before your trial ends, we’ll move you to

the Free plan — as long as you meet the user limit requirements. If not, your

subscription will be deactivated.
